# FireVision IPTV

> Self-hosted IPTV management console for Android TV and Fire TV

FireVision IPTV is a free, open-source platform for managing IPTV channels on Android TV and Amazon Fire TV devices. It includes a Next.js web dashboard and a Kotlin Android TV player app.

## Core Features

- M3U playlist import with DRM support
- Multi-source import: IPTV-org, Pluto TV, Samsung TV Plus
- Fire TV / Android TV device pairing via codes
- Role-based user access control
- Real-time analytics dashboard
- Self-hosted with Docker Compose

## Links

- Website: https://tv.cadnative.com
- Android TV App: https://github.com/akshaynikhare/FireVisionIPTV/releases/latest
- Server Source: https://github.com/akshaynikhare/FireVisionIPTVServer
- App Source: https://github.com/akshaynikhare/FireVisionIPTV
- API Documentation: https://tv.cadnative.com/api/v1/

## Tech Stack

- **Server**: Node.js, Express, TypeScript, MongoDB
- **Frontend**: Next.js 14, React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
- **Android App**: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, ExoPlayer
- **Deployment**: Docker, Docker Compose

## Who Is This For?

- Users who want to self-host their own IPTV server
- Android TV / Fire TV owners looking for a free IPTV player
- Developers building custom IPTV solutions
- Cord-cutters managing free-to-air and legal IPTV streams

## Author

Built by Akshay Nikhare (https://github.com/akshaynikhare)
Published by CADNative
